data.title: Microservices
data.description: Adobe utilizes a microservices architecture to ensure flexibility and scalability of its cloud solutions.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Adobe operates on a cloud infrastructure to provide seamless, scalable service to its global user base.
data.technical_spec: Uses SaaS (Software as a Service) model, hosted on AWS.

data.title: Multi-tenancy
data.description: Supports multiple users on a single instance with isolation of user data.
data.technical_spec: Isolated data layers with shared application codebase.

data.title: API-First Approach
data.description: APIs are used extensively for integration between internal services and with third-party solutions.
data.technical_spec: RESTful and GraphQL APIs with OAuth 2.0 for authentication.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: CDN is used to accelerate content delivery and improve user experience globally.
data.technical_spec: Integration with global CDN providers like Akamai.
